_meta.name: p20
_meta.method: Task #55 fallback CZA diagnostic; visual R22 hypotheses 430/455/500 all put CZA apex above frame
_meta.status: CZA not applicable / cropped; do not use as CZA-apex residual
_meta.note: The upper glow aligns with the 22-degree halo / upper-tangent region. Watermark and flare contamination make this a lower-confidence parhelia/belt reference.

r22_source_note: p20 shows no continuous 22° halo arc — only parhelia and a sun pillar. R22 was set from the parhelion offsets, so the parhelion-route residual is tautological on this photo. Audit memo §2 item 7 confirms. Pass B1 classification 2026-05-13; ineligible for parhelion-route promotion regardless of residual.

parhelion.visibility: provisional low-sun estimate; right side is contaminated by watermark/flare

cza.note: With R22 ~= 455, R46 ~= 910, so predicted CZA apex y = 827 - 910 = -83.
